hero.title: System Analyst from Argentina to the World
hero.subtitle: Technical Architect crafting high-performance digital products.
hero.codeComment: Excellence is not an act, it is a habit

about.profile_html: I am a dedicated Frontend Specialist with over 6 years of experience building high-performance web and mobile applications. My expertise lies in the React JS & React Native ecosystem, where I leverage TypeScript to build robust, type-safe architectures that stand the test of time.
about.qa_html: What sets my approach apart is a quality-first mindset shaped by my background in Quality Assurance (QA). Having spent time in a QA role, I view code through a highly critical lens, anticipating edge cases and potential failures long before they reach production. I am a firm advocate for:
qa_points: Test-Driven Reliability: Implementing comprehensive Unit Testing with high coverage to ensure code is not just functional, but maintainable and resilient.
Scalable Architecture: Writing clean, modular code that simplifies the debugging process and facilitates long-term growth.
User-Centric Design: Bridging the gap between technical excellence and seamless user experiences, ensuring every interface is as intuitive as it is performant.
about.soft_skills_html: I consider myself a proactive professional with excellent soft skills, always eager to learn and ready to take on new challenges. I thrive in collaborative environments where I can contribute to the full development lifecycle—from initial UI/UX concepts to final deployment and quality validation.
about.journey_p1_html: My story in technology began in 2005 as a state employee, in A.P.A (Administración Provincial del Agua) where I developed administrative systems using Visual FoxPro. This early experience gave me a solid foundation in logic and database management.
about.ent_html: In 2008, I channeled my technical knowledge into my own business. For over a decade, I managed a computer services and hardware retail store. This period was crucial for developing my proactive mindset and soft skills, as I was directly responsible for technical problem-solving and customer success.
about.dt_p1_html: In 2019, I was invited back to my original public sector workplace (A.P.A) to lead a critical transition. With a more mature perspective, I proposed and executed the migration of legacy desktop systems to modern web architectures.
about.dt_p2_html: Using React, Firebase, and Bootstrap, I successfully migrated key administrative modules, including:
about.dt_p3_html: This experience was a turning point, allowing me to master modern frontend workflows before transitioning fully into the private sector at Temperies in 2022 until Present.
about.drives_me_intro: When I’m not at my desk, I’m usually focusing on the things that keep me grounded and inspired:
about.family_desc: I have been happily married for 14 years and am the proud father of two: a 13-year-old daughter and a 10-year-old son. They are my greatest motivation.
about.cars_desc: There is something incredibly rewarding about bringing an old vehicle back to life. It’s the same 'problem-solving' itch I get from coding, but with a lot more grease!
about.music_desc: I love playing the piano and guitar. It’s my favorite way to switch off the logical brain and tap into something more creative.
about.travel_desc: Exploring new places with my family is our favorite way to create lasting memories together.
about.favorite_quote: The only thing impossible is what you don't try!

projects.description: Transforming industries through code. From the automotive, real estate, and e-commerce sectors, I develop robust interface architectures that drive urban and digital growth. I am guided by precision, scalability, and logic.

stockautos.title: STOCKAUTOS
stockautos.content: Automotive management system with n8n automation. Enables massive or individual automated vehicle publishing across multiple platforms. Robust backend powered by Supabase.

alkila.title: Alkila
alkila.content: Real estate platform focused on the Santa Rosa market. Developed with React, Tailwind, and Supabase, it offers an advanced filtering and search system for efficient local property matching.

raminformatica.title: RAM Informática
raminformatica.content: Integrated e-commerce and administrative dashboard. Uses React and Python for automated price updates: a script processes WhatsApp Business messages from suppliers to recalculate profit margins in real-time.

detakito.title: deTaquito
detakito.content: Extreme performance showcase in React Native using Fabric Architecture for a smooth, native user experience.

controlgastos.title: ControlGastos
controlgastos.content: 100% responsive Web App for personal finance management. Includes tracking for fixed/variable expenses, credit cards, and loans, with detailed graphical reports. Backend on Supabase.

interests_section.subtitle: Expanding my stack and exploring new frontiers.
interests_section.python_desc: Actively learning Python oriented towards Artificial Intelligence. I am exploring the foundations of machine learning, neural networks, and how to integrate AI directly into new and existing codebases.
interests_section.nextjs_desc: Currently diving deeper into Next.js 14/15, App Router, and React Server Components. Building full-stack implementations to maximize SEO and minimize time-to-interactive for end users.
interests_section.ai_desc: Getting more involved with AI learning, understanding how LLMs reason, and using autonomous agents to accelerate development cycles and design systems.

mission.humor_desc: Software development doesn't have to be rigid. Maintaining a positive and collaborative environment accelerates problem-solving and fosters creativity in code.
mission.proactivity_desc: I don't just write code; I anticipate needs, propose real architectural improvements, and act before bottlenecks impact the product.
mission.responsibility_desc: Total ownership of the metrics. From the first commit to production deployment, the success of the project is my absolute priority.

experience.title: Experience
experience.summary_text:
I have 6 years of experience as a Frontend Developer in the IT private sector, specializing in building scalable and efficient solutions. During my time at Fasterway, I led critical projects that directly impacted both user experience and technical stability.

One of my biggest challenges was implementing Push Notifications from scratch, designing the entire messaging architecture. I also managed the app's most significant technological leap: the migration from React Native 0.73 to 0.84. This involved adopting the Fabric architecture, which required a deep refactor and the migration of numerous libraries to align with the new rendering engine.

Regarding observability, I successfully integrated Google Analytics and Microsoft Clarity across both mobile and desktop platforms, enabling data-driven decision-making. I also spearheaded a complete refactor of the web platform, migrating 6-year-old legacy class components to functional components and Hooks, significantly improving code maintainability and performance.

Lastly, I am well-versed in the full deployment lifecycle, managing DEV, QA, and PROD environments for both iOS and Android, including Store submissions. To streamline our workflow, I proposed and implemented a structured branching methodology, which ensured stable releases for the QA team and minimized the risk of merging buggy code into production builds.

description: FasterWay (January 2024 - Present): Fitness & Nutrition platform (Mobile & Web).
Arculix (July 2022 - December 2023): User security issues, access modes & permissions.
SecureAuth (May 2022 - July 2022): Theme & Rebranding interface application.
UMOV (April 2022 - May 2022): HealthTech back-office for clinic user interaction.
LinkLabs (March 2022 - April 2022): Real-time location system maintenance.

fasterway.title: Faster Way to Fat Loss
fasterway.content: Comprehensive transformation of a premier fitness/nutrition platform. For Web, I developed a control center for coaches using React JS and Material UI. For Mobile, I worked with React Native (v0.84), implementing Fabric Architecture for high performance. Integrated AI utilities for food tracking via voice and image recognition, and a custom chatbot.

arculix.title: Arculix (USA)
arculix.content: Starting from scratch in a project to manage user security issues, access modes, and permissions. Created new customized components based on BlueprintJS library according to specific client requirements.

secureauth.title: SecureAuth (USA)
secureauth.content: Collaborated on the Theme & Rebranding initiative, completely transforming the visual aspect and user experience of the interface application.

umov.title: Umov - Clinic App (CHILE)
umov.content: Collaborated on the development of a robust backoffice web application designed to handle complex user interactions and management for medical clinics.

linklabs.title: LinkLabs - Real-Time Location (USA)
linklabs.content: Maintained and enhanced a system for real-time location. Added new functionalities based on client needs and resolved critical system bugs.

description: StockAutos: Automotive management system with multi-platform automation.
Alkila: Full-scale real estate marketplace for the local market.
RAM Informática: E-commerce & Dashboard with Python pricing bot.
deTaquito: Extreme performance mobile showcase (Fabric Architecture).
ControlGastos Web: FinTech responsive app for financial tracking.
ControlGastos Mobile: Native app with shared PostgreSQL database.

stockautos.title: StockAutos
stockautos.content: A high-performance automotive inventory management system. I built an autonomous workflow using n8n that processes vehicle data and automatically publishes to Facebook Marketplace, Instagram, and web portals. Features a robust backend on Supabase.

alkila.title: Alkila Marketplace
alkila.content: Developed a full-scale real estate marketplace focusing on the local market of Santa Rosa. Implemented advanced filtering systems and property matching logic, integrated with automated lead management.

ram.title: RAM Informática
ram.content: Designed an integrated e-commerce and administrative dashboard. Included a custom Python automation script that processes WhatsApp messages from tech suppliers to recalculate profit margins in real-time.

detakito.title: deTaquito
detakito.content: A technical showcase app designed to push the boundaries of React Native. Implemented the new Fabric Architecture to ensure 60 FPS performance and a truly native user experience.

controlgastos.title: ControlGastos Web
controlgastos.content: A 100% responsive FinTech Web App for personal cash flow management. Includes interactive dashboards, detailed reports for credit cards, and automated expense categorization. Powered by a PostgreSQL database on Supabase.

controlgastos_mobile.title: ControlGastos Mobile
controlgastos_mobile.content: Native mobile application extending the ControlGastos ecosystem. It utilizes a shared PostgreSQL database via Supabase to ensure real-time synchronization between web and mobile platforms.

description: I led the migration of legacy systems from Visual FoxPro to modern web applications built with React.
I developed critical modules for human resources, personnel management, leave tracking, payroll, and inventory control for vehicles and assets for the administration.
